texto: . . . But then you will want to put that {publication} behind you right away. You will want to recover the obscurity you swim best through. You've got eternal youth there. You'll never be satisfied. If you get lucky, it will be a darkness so pure it will mirror not the 'self,' but the mysterious 'other.
explicacao: Citação de Louis B. Jones sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. “. . . But then you will want to put that {publication} behind you right away.
